reference: IF IT HAD BEEN POSSIBLE TO SEND MISSUS RANSOM MONEY OR EVEN CLOTHES SHE WOULD HAVE LIKED THAT BUT SHE HAD NO MEANS OF ASCERTAINING HOW SUCH AN OFFERING WOULD BE TAKEN
text: If it had been possible to send Mrs. Ransom money, or even clothes, she would have liked that, but she had no means of ascertaining how such an offering would be taken.
